note: Probability weights set BEFORE calculating scenario prices (anti-anchoring protocol). Director reveals current stock price in Step 2.7 after fair values are locked.

bull.label: Bull Case
bull.description: AI monetization materializes faster (Meta AI subs $5B+ by 2027), Reels/Threads ad load continues expanding, TikTok US exit boosts share, CapEx ROI validates via high-margin AI revenue streams. Reality Labs losses begin to moderate. Operating leverage drives margins above 45%.

base.label: Base Case
base.description: Consensus-aligned: FY2026 +27% growth, deceleration to ~12% by FY2030. AI investment ROI is real but diffuse — improves ad targeting and efficiency, not discrete new revenue streams in the near term. Operating margin compresses in 2026-2027 due to CapEx/R&D then recovers. Reality Labs losses stable.

bear.label: Bear Case
bear.description: CapEx ROI disappoints (AI revenue fails to materialize at scale by 2028), EU DMA WhatsApp fine ~$10-16B in 2026-2027, youth mental health trial losses >$5B in 2026, Chinese advertisers (Temu/Shein) pull back $5-8B on trade tensions, margin remains compressed through 2028. Revenue growth decelerates sharply to ~8% by 2029-2030.
bear_case_risks_embedded: EU DMA WhatsApp investigation → $14-16B fine + interoperability mandate
Youth mental health litigation → $5-12B adverse verdict/settlement
CapEx ROI failure → structurally compressed FCF through 2028
Revenue growth deceleration below consensus by ~3-4pp per year

probability_weighted_fair_value.note: Blended DCF: 70% perpetuity growth method, 30% exit EBITDA multiple cross-check

comps_implied_range.method: Peer median multiples (GOOGL, AMZN, SNAP, PINS)
comps_implied_range.best_comps_method: EV/EBITDA and P/E forward most relevant; EV/Revenue least relevant given META margin premium
comps_implied_range.data_quality: All peer EV data [ESTIMATED] from public sources (Tier 2)
comps_implied_range.caveat: META FCF depressed in 2026-2027 due to CapEx surge; EV/FCF multiple less reliable near-term

key_value_drivers.most_sensitive_to: Terminal growth rate and WACC (TV = 85%+ of EV in all scenarios)
key_value_drivers.biggest_upside_driver: AI monetization speed — Meta AI subscriptions + new ad formats
key_value_drivers.biggest_downside_driver: CapEx ROI failure combined with EU regulatory action
key_value_drivers.fcf_inflection_point: FY2028 — base case FCF recovers to $60B+ once CapEx normalizes
key_value_drivers.rl_net_present_cost: Reality Labs worth -$150 to -$200/share in NPV terms if losses persist at $19B/yr (base case)

quality_flags: [ASSUMPTION] All scenario probability weights (25/50/25) set before calculating prices
[ASSUMPTION] Terminal value is 85%+ of EV — high sensitivity to WACC/TGR inputs
[ASSUMPTION] CapEx normalization timeline is highly uncertain; key sensitivity driver
[ESTIMATED] D&A estimated as % of revenue; actual figure not directly disclosed
[ESTIMATED] META EBITDA $110B is estimated (D&A not disclosed)
[DATA GAP] Exact debt maturity schedule not retrieved; total LT debt $58.7B known
[ASSUMPTION] Net cash bridge uses FY2025 balance sheet; will change with CapEx deployment
